description: The JUNO nominated and Canadian Folk Music Award winning group are Canada’s bluegrass band to watch. Rooted in tradition, fearlessly creative and possessing a bold, dynamic sound, The Slocan Ramblers have become a leading light of today’s acoustic music scene. With a reputation for energetic live shows, impeccable musicianship and an uncanny ability to convert anyone within earshot into a lifelong fan, the group has been winning over audiences from Merlefest to RockyGrass and everywhere in between.
title: The Slocan Ramblers Concert
